---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
```

## Reading in data
```{r}
hr_data <- read_sensor_data("HR.csv.gz")

ibi_data <- read_sensor_data("IBI.csv.gz")

temp_data <- read_sensor_data("TEMP.csv.gz")

bvp_data <- read_sensor_data("BVP.csv.gz")

eda_data <- read_sensor_data("EDA.csv.gz")
```

```{r}
```
